name: Yara
description: The pattern matching swiss knife for malware researchers (and everyone else)

actions.name: Clear Yara Sources
actions.description: Delete any files stored in the Vault to clear any Yara rules persisted for this asset

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: A valid file glob, relative to the value of the app's state directory

actions.name: Update Yara Sources
actions.description: Download and persist any rule sources defined in assets associated with this app

actions.name: List Yara Sources
actions.description: List sources of Yara rules previously downloaded and stored in the Vault

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: A relative path to provide for listing specific files in the app's state_dir.  Defaults to "**", or directories in state_dir.  Some examples could be "**/*.yar" or "malware-rules/**"

parameters.name: stat_info
parameters.description: A boolean to optionally return the information from os.stat_result for each file object found.  Defaults to False

actions.name: Yara Scan
actions.description: Compile (if needed) any specified Yara rules and scan specified target for matches

parameters.name: yara_path
parameters.description: String to use for recursive file glob, relative to state directory, for locating Yara rules to use in scan.  Defaults to all files in the state directory

parameters.name: use_includes
parameters.description: Whether or not rules found can use the include directive to load other files.  Defaults to False

parameters.name: scan_dir
parameters.description: Directory to scan for matches.  If not specified, vault_id is required

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: Vault ID of a file to look up for scanning.  If not specified scan_dir is required

parameters.name: fast_mode
parameters.description: Whether or not to have Yara perform a fast mode scan.  Defaults to False

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: How long until a match function in Yara will time out?  Defaults to 60 seconds

parameters.name: stack_size
parameters.description: Set the stack size used by Yara.  Set with set_config(), interfacing with the C API

parameters.name: max_strings_per_rule
parameters.description: Set the Yara configuration to define the number of max_strings_per_rule

parameters.name: max_match_data
parameters.description: Set the max_match_data in Yara configuration
